templates.employee_summary: Your company will typically sponsor an Employment Pass (EP) or S Pass depending on role and salary. ReloPass tracks documents and milestones so HR and you stay aligned before the move.
templates.hr_summary: Standard path: verify quota/salary benchmarks, obtain EP or S Pass approval via MOM, then complete issuance and relocation steps. Timeline compresses if dependants need passes.
templates.internal_notes_hr: Confirm COMPASS / Fair Consideration where applicable; check DP needs early.
watchouts: EP processing can take several weeks; start once salary and role classification are firm.
Dependant passes add parallel documentation (marriage/birth certificates, translations).
IPA validity window is tight — align travel and entry dates with HR.

checklist.title: Signed employment contract & job description
checklist.notes_employee: Your HR team provides these for the pass application.
checklist.notes_hr: Ensure JD matches MOM role classification.

checklist.title: Passport bio page (all travellers)
checklist.notes_employee: Valid for at least 6 months beyond intended entry.

checklist.title: Company EP application submission
checklist.notes_employee: Handled by HR or immigration partner.

checklist.title: In-Principle Approval (IPA) received
checklist.notes_employee: You will need IPA for entry when instructed.

checklist.title: Medical examination (if required)
checklist.notes_employee: Clinic list usually provided with IPA.

milestones.title: Kickoff & route confirmation
milestones.body_employee: HR confirms the sponsored pass route and timeline with you.
milestones.body_hr: Lock salary band, role title, and dependency on EP vs S Pass.

milestones.title: Document pack complete
milestones.body_employee: You upload passport, education, and family documents as requested.

milestones.title: MOM submission
milestones.body_employee: Handled by employer; you may be asked for clarifications.
milestones.body_hr: Submit EP/S Pass application; monitor status.

milestones.title: IPA issued
milestones.body_employee: Review entry instructions and validity dates.
milestones.body_hr: Share IPA; plan entry and pass issuance appointment.

milestones.title: Enter Singapore & complete pass formalities
milestones.body_employee: Follow IPA conditions; attend appointment if required.

milestones.title: Settle-in & local registrations
milestones.body_employee: Bank, phone, housing handover as applicable.

templates.route_title: France — Salarié / passeport talent (high-level typical paths)
templates.employee_summary: France offers several sponsored work routes; your employer’s immigration partner usually selects between standard employee permits or talent passports depending on role and compensation.
templates.hr_summary: Validate work authorization path with counsel; long-stay visa + titre de séjour sequence applies for most non-EU nationals. Lead times vary by consulate.
templates.internal_notes_hr: Talent passport eligibility reduces some steps — confirm with legal.
watchouts: Consulate appointment availability can be the critical path.
Medical visit (OFII) and titre appointments are sequential — do not skip ordering.
Housing proof may be needed early for some visa types.

checklist.title: Work contract & assignment letter
checklist.notes_hr: French or certified translation as required.

checklist.title: Long-stay visa application
checklist.notes_employee: Book consulate appointment when HR confirms pack.
checklist.notes_hr: Track VLS-TS vs other visa types.

checklist.title: Housing lease or temporary accommodation proof
checklist.notes_hr: May be required for some steps.

milestones.title: Route & counsel alignment
milestones.body_employee: HR explains expected permit path and timing.

milestones.title: Arrival in France
milestones.body_employee: Start visa validation / OFII steps as instructed.
